chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1263 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 18.10.2016. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel alongwith SIP Nisar Ahmed Brohi, SHO P.S Lashari, ASI Ghulam Shabbir Siyal incharge SHO Rasheed Waggan. -.-.-. Today, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that report from the Director General Health Services Sindh Hyderabad has been filed, where under the medical board has unanimously opined that age of petitioner No.1 Mst. Maryam Khatoon is 20 years. However, he showed his apprehension that since respondent No.8 the father of petitioner No.1 has lodged a FIR as mentioned in the Statement of respondent No.6 (SHO P.S Lashari), there is every likelihood that not only petitioner No.2 (husband of petitioner No.1) will be arrested but also will be subjected to torture. In the order dated 04.08.2016 it has been mentioned that petitioner No.1 also appeared before the Court and produced affidavit of her freewill marriage, whereafter the official respondents were directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners. In view of the above position, it would be just and proper that the petitioners should approach the learned trial Court to agitate their grievance in respect of the FIR No. 146/2016 under Section 365-B, 496 PPC lodged at P.S Lashari. However, in the meantime petitioners shall not be arrested in respect of this FIR as admittedly petitioner No.1 has not been kidnapped by petitioner No.2. In view of the above, the instant petition stands disposed of.

However, in the meantime petitioners shall not be arrested in respect of this FIR as admittedly petitioner No.1 has not been kidnapped by petitioner No.2. In view of the above, the instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE
